history.text: Ancient Egyptian records linked the Land of Punt with trade around the Horn of Africa.
Macrobia appears in ancient accounts of the Somali coast and the wider Horn of Africa.
Barbaria appears in ancient accounts of the Somali coast and the wider Horn of Africa.
Adal Sultanate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Mogadishu Sultanate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Sultanate of Ifat ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Ajuran Sultanate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Hiraab Imamate appears in Somalia's historical record.
